role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Strictly analyzed the script on the sign (Kanji/Hiragana) and its implications.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation types, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Musa) and canopy structures.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (guardrails, manholes) and signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural and infrastructure details to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Japan as the location. The linguistic agent provided the definitive evidence (Japanese script), which the regulatory and meta agents reinforced with infrastructure analysis. The tournament logic was sound, using the script to eliminate non-Japanese candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately quoted the visible text on the orange sign.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the hillside, vegetation, and road layout.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified banana plants and broadleaf trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the white guardrails and manhole cover.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the house siding and roof style.
